content_body: What a great time we have had! Don't want to go home. Came up from Canton and Cumming GA to celebrate not only my 26th birthday, but to also make great memories with great friends! We have relaxed most of the weekend, got alot of snow and ice which made it hard getting up and down that long driveway! Many many wonderful memories were made here at the cabin.  Hope to be back soon!
title: 26th Birthday Celebration in Blue Ridge
